# multilang_repo - Multi-language project for import extraction testing
# Used for: DOM-IMPORT, E2E-MULTILANG

# Python files
src/
├── __init__.py
└── py_module.py    # import statements

# JavaScript files
js/
├── __init__.js
└── js_module.js   # require/import statements

# TypeScript files
ts/
├── __init__.ts
└── ts_module.ts  # import statements

# Go files
go/
└── go_module.go  # import statements

# Java files
java/
└── App.java      # import statements
